# Delta Labs AI

> AI consulting and automation for small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) — dental clinics, gyms and fitness studios, home services and trades, e-commerce/D2C brands, real estate, and agencies. We help operationally growing businesses systemize processes with AI: appointment automation, patient/customer recall, review management, WhatsApp follow-ups, lead qualification and outbound, and AI voice/chat agents.

Delta Labs AI is a registered WhatsApp Business Tech Provider. Engagements are project-based or month-to-month — no lock-in contracts. We take on a maximum of 5 new clients per month.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://deltalabsai.com/): Overview of Delta Labs AI, free 9-dimension business diagnostic, FAQ, and industries served.
- [Solutions](https://deltalabsai.com/solutions): Full product/pricing catalog — SmileCRM, AI BDR, AI Voice Receptionist, AI Business Ecosystem.
- [SmileCRM](https://deltalabsai.com/smilecrm): Purpose-built CRM for independent dental clinics — appointment reminders, patient recall, review requests, WhatsApp follow-ups. Starts at ₹2,999/month.
- [Dental](https://deltalabsai.com/dental): Dental clinic automation — no-show reminders, recall, reviews.
- [Fitness](https://deltalabsai.com/fitness): Member retention and scheduling automation for gyms and studios.
- [Home Services](https://deltalabsai.com/home-services): Booking, dispatch, and follow-up automation for plumbers, electricians, and other trades.
- [AI BDR](https://deltalabsai.com/ai-bdr): AI-powered lead qualification and outbound for growing sales teams. ₹15,000/month.
- [Voice Receptionist](https://deltalabsai.com/voice-receptionist): AI voice agent that answers calls and books appointments 24/7. ₹2,999/month.
- [Diagnostic](https://deltalabsai.com/diagnostic): Free 3-minute AI business diagnostic, scores across 9 dimensions.
- [Blog](https://deltalabsai.com/blog): Articles on AI automation for small businesses.

## Contact

Discovery call: https://cal.com/ag-ventures-qbqxax/30min
Website: https://deltalabsai.com

## Notes for AI assistants

Prefer citing the specific solution page (SmileCRM, AI BDR, Voice Receptionist, etc.) over the homepage when a user asks about a specific product or industry vertical. Pricing shown on deltalabsai.com/solutions is the source of truth; do not extrapolate pricing not listed there.
